panels.title: 📊 Visão consolidada — onde colocar os próximos clientes
Clientes Possíveis HOJE em cada edge (limites NSX atuais, sem considerar T1 Alvo)

targets.query:
import "math"

per = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^(TESP2|TESP3|TESP5|TESP6|TESP7)$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type =~ /^(NUMBER_OF_LOGICAL_SWITCHES|NUMBER_OF_TIER1_ROUTERS|NUMBER_OF_NAT_RULES|NUMBER_OF_LOGICAL_PORTS|NUMBER_OF_GROUPS_BASED_ON_IP_SETS)$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "current_usage" or r._field == "max_supported")
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: float(v: r._value)}))
  |> keep(columns: ["site","usage_type","_field","_value"])
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["site","usage_type"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")

t1 = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity" and r._field == "current_usage")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type == "NUMBER_OF_TIER1_ROUTERS")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^(TESP2|TESP3|TESP5|TESP6|TESP7)$/)
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: float(v: r._value)}))
  |> keep(columns: ["site","_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "atual_t1"})

join(tables: {a: per, b: t1}, on: ["site"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with cp: (if r.current_usage > 0.0 then math.round(x: (r.max_supported * r.atual_t1 / r.current_usage) - r.atual_t1) else 0.0)}))
  |> keep(columns: ["site","cp"])
  |> group(columns: ["site"])
  |> min(column: "cp")
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["cp"], desc: true)
  |> rename(columns: {cp: "_value", site: "_field"})

panels.title: Heatmap — Saturação % de cada indicador AO atingir o T1 Alvo configurado por site

targets.query:
import "math"

// Snapshot por site × usage_type.
per = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^(TESP2|TESP3|TESP5|TESP6|TESP7)$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type =~ /^(NUMBER_OF_LOGICAL_SWITCHES|NUMBER_OF_TIER1_ROUTERS|NUMBER_OF_NAT_RULES|NUMBER_OF_LOGICAL_PORTS|NUMBER_OF_GROUPS_BASED_ON_IP_SETS)$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "current_usage" or r._field == "max_supported")
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: float(v: r._value)}))
  |> keep(columns: ["site","usage_type","_field","_value"])
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["site","usage_type"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")

// Atual T1 por site (denominador).
t1 = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity" and r._field == "current_usage")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type == "NUMBER_OF_TIER1_ROUTERS")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^(TESP2|TESP3|TESP5|TESP6|TESP7)$/)
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: float(v: r._value)}))
  |> keep(columns: ["site","_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "atual_t1"})

join(tables: {a: per, b: t1}, on: ["site"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with alvo_t1: (if r.site == "TESP2" then float(v: ${alvo_tesp2}) else if r.site == "TESP3" then float(v: ${alvo_tesp3}) else if r.site == "TESP5" then float(v: ${alvo_tesp5}) else if r.site == "TESP6" then float(v: ${alvo_tesp6}) else if r.site == "TESP7" then float(v: ${alvo_tesp7}) else 3000.0)}))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with
         Indicador: (if r.usage_type == "NUMBER_OF_LOGICAL_SWITCHES" then "Segments" else if r.usage_type == "NUMBER_OF_TIER1_ROUTERS" then "T1" else if r.usage_type == "NUMBER_OF_NAT_RULES" then "System-wide NAT" else if r.usage_type == "NUMBER_OF_LOGICAL_PORTS" then "System-wide Logical Switch Ports" else if r.usage_type == "NUMBER_OF_GROUPS_BASED_ON_IP_SETS" then "Groups Based on IP Sets" else r.usage_type),
         saturacao: (if r.atual_t1 > 0.0 then math.round(x: (r.current_usage + (r.current_usage / r.atual_t1) * (r.alvo_t1 - r.atual_t1)) / r.max_supported * 1000.0) / 10.0 else 0.0),
       }))
  |> keep(columns: ["site","Indicador","saturacao"])
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["site"], columnKey: ["Indicador"], valueColumn: "saturacao")
  |> sort(columns: ["site"])

panels.title: TESP2 — Indicadores NSX (Limite, Atual, Por cliente, Projeção, Final, Saturação, Sobra, Clientes Possíveis)

targets.query:
import "math"

site = "TESP2"
alvo_t1 = float(v: ${alvo_tesp2})

// Pega current + max por usage_type. rowKey só usage_type ⇒ 1 linha por dimensão.
per_ind = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site == site)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type =~ /^(NUMBER_OF_LOGICAL_SWITCHES|NUMBER_OF_TIER1_ROUTERS|NUMBER_OF_NAT_RULES|NUMBER_OF_LOGICAL_PORTS|NUMBER_OF_GROUPS_BASED_ON_IP_SETS)$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "current_usage" or r._field == "max_supported")
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: float(v: r._value)}))
  |> keep(columns: ["usage_type","_field","_value"])
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["usage_type"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")

// Pega Atual T1 do mesmo site como escalar (denominador do "Por cliente").
t1_now = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity" and r._field == "current_usage")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site == site)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type == "NUMBER_OF_TIER1_ROUTERS")
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

atual_t1 = if exists t1_now._value and float(v: t1_now._value) > 0.0 then float(v: t1_now._value) else 1.0
delta_t1 = alvo_t1 - atual_t1

per_ind
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with
         Indicador: (if r.usage_type == "NUMBER_OF_LOGICAL_SWITCHES" then "Segments" else if r.usage_type == "NUMBER_OF_TIER1_ROUTERS" then "T1" else if r.usage_type == "NUMBER_OF_NAT_RULES" then "System-wide NAT" else if r.usage_type == "NUMBER_OF_LOGICAL_PORTS" then "System-wide Logical Switch Ports" else if r.usage_type == "NUMBER_OF_GROUPS_BASED_ON_IP_SETS" then "Groups Based on IP Sets" else r.usage_type),
         por_cliente:        math.round(x: r.current_usage / atual_t1 * 100.0) / 100.0,
         projecao:           math.round(x: (r.current_usage / atual_t1) * delta_t1),
         numero_final:       math.round(x: r.current_usage + (r.current_usage / atual_t1) * delta_t1),
         saturacao_pct:      math.round(x: (r.current_usage + (r.current_usage / atual_t1) * delta_t1) / r.max_supported * 1000.0) / 10.0,
         sobra:              math.round(x: r.max_supported - (r.current_usage + (r.current_usage / atual_t1) * delta_t1)),
         max_clientes:       (if r.current_usage > 0.0 then math.round(x: r.max_supported * atual_t1 / r.current_usage) else 0.0),
         clientes_possiveis: (if r.current_usage > 0.0 then math.round(x: (r.max_supported * atual_t1 / r.current_usage) - atual_t1) else 0.0),
       }))
  |> keep(columns: ["Indicador","max_supported","current_usage","por_cliente","projecao","numero_final","saturacao_pct","sobra","max_clientes","clientes_possiveis"])
  |> rename(columns: {
         max_supported:      "Limite NSX",
         current_usage:      "Nº Atual",
         por_cliente:        "Por cliente",
         projecao:           "Projeção",
         numero_final:       "Número final",
         saturacao_pct:      "Saturação ao alvo (%)",
         sobra:              "Sobra",
         max_clientes:       "Max clientes",
         clientes_possiveis: "Clientes Possíveis",
       })
  |> sort(columns: ["Saturação ao alvo (%)"], desc: true)
  |> group()

         sobra:              math.round(x: r.max_supported - (r.current_usage + (r.current_usage / atual_t1) * delta_t1)),
         max_clientes:       (if r.current_usage > 0.0 then math.round(x: r.max_supported * atual_t1 / r.current_usage) else 0.0),
         clientes_possiveis: (if r.current_usage > 0.0 then math.round(x: (r.max_supported * atual_t1 / r.current_usage) - atual_t1) else 0.0),

  |> keep(columns: ["Indicador","max_supported","current_usage","por_cliente","projecao","numero_final","saturacao_pct","sobra","max_clientes","clientes_possiveis"])
  |> rename(columns: {

         saturacao_pct:      math.round(x: (r.current_usage + (r.current_usage / atual_t1) * delta_t1) / r.max_supported * 1000.0) / 10.0,
         sobra:              math.round(x: r.max_supported - (r.current_usage + (r.current_usage / atual_t1) * delta_t1)),
         max_clientes:       (if r.current_usage > 0.0 then math.round(x: r.max_supported * atual_t1 / r.current_usage) else 0.0),
         clientes_possiveis: (if r.current_usage > 0.0 then math.round(x: (r.max_supported * atual_t1 / r.current_usage) - atual_t1) else 0.0),
       }))
  |> keep(columns: ["Indicador","max_supported","current_usage","por_cliente","projecao","numero_final","saturacao_pct","sobra","max_clientes","clientes_possiveis"])
  |> rename(columns: {
         max_supported:      "Limite NSX",
         current_usage:      "Nº Atual",
         por_cliente:        "Por cliente",
         projecao:           "Projeção",
         numero_final:       "Número final",
         saturacao_pct:      "Saturação ao alvo (%)",
         sobra:              "Sobra",
         max_clientes:       "Max clientes",
         clientes_possiveis: "Clientes Possíveis",
       })
  |> sort(columns: ["Saturação ao alvo (%)"], desc: true)
  |> group()
